Thank you for contributing. Please complete this template so reviewers can
understand your change. Empty sections block review.

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What user value does it add? -->

## Changes

-
-

## Testing

<!-- How have you verified this change?
     For user-visible features, confirm e2e coverage across all four client
     languages (Python, Node, Go, Java). -->

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Property tests added / updated (if combinatorial surface)
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated
- [ ] E2E tests added / updated for all four client languages
- [ ] `make lint test-unit` passes locally
- [ ] Coverage on changed files is ≥90% (line and branch)

## Documentation

- [ ] User guide added / updated in `docs/guides/`
- [ ] Reference docs updated (compatibility matrix / function mapping / CLI)
- [ ] Architecture doc updated (`docs/architecture/`)
- [ ] ADR added (if architectural decision)
- [ ] Runnable example added / updated in `docs/examples/`

## Release hygiene

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `Unreleased`
- [ ] Catalog migration added (if schema changed)
- [ ] No `TODO` / `FIXME` without a linked issue number
- [ ] Conventional Commits used

## Related

<!-- Related issues, RFCs, ADRs. Use `Closes #123`, `Implements RFC 0007`, etc. -->

-
